calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jun-27-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

RE: Plaintiff BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The court adopts the following tentative ruling:

Defendant LOREN C SMITH's claim of exemption is granted in part. The levying officer is directed to withhold $100 per pay period (every two weeks) from defendant's earnings.

Judge: Richard B, Ulmer Jr., Clerk: R. Woods, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-09-2023 Off Calendar
